overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rural lumber mill and village area before transitioning onto a forest trail. The scene features overcast lighting, traditional wooden architecture, and a desaturated color palette typical of the game's aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: lumber mill with wooden tracks and stairs

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden tracks past lumber piles and a large wooden stair structure

entered.detail: tall wooden staircase structure with railings
stacks of cut wooden logs and planks

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a lumber mill area with wooden stairs on the right and piles of lumber along the path. The space is enclosed by wooden structures and fencing, with overcast skies visible above.

events.description: passing villagers working near wooden posts along the path

agents.ego_description: walking through the village center passing NPCs working near the path

notable_agents.action: villager standing near wooden posts holding a farming tool
villager walking ahead on the dirt path

entered.detail: traditional wooden house with dark timber walls
wooden structure with thatched roof sections
wooden barrel container near the house

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a small village with traditional wooden houses on both sides. Several NPC villagers are visible working near wooden posts along the path as the character continues forward through the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail through tall grass and trees

events.description: exiting the village and entering the open forest path

agents.ego_description: walking along a winding dirt path through grassy forest terrain away from civilization

entered.detail: tall pine and deciduous trees forming the forest edge
tall wild grass and vegetation lining the trail

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide forest trail surrounded by tall grass and dense trees. The path winds through the natural landscape as the character continues walking away from the village into the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the enclosed structures of a lumber mill into the open expanse of a forest trail. It begins by navigating a narrow path lined with piles of lumber and wooden stairs under an overcast sky. As the character moves forward, the industrial surroundings give way to a small village where traditional wooden houses and working villagers line the route. The scene then opens and expands as the settlement recedes, shifting from the architectural confines of the village into a wide wilderness. Finally, the camera follows the path as it winds through tall grass and dense trees, leaving the village behind for the natural landscape of the forest.
